name.zh: 时代广场 · 夜色巨幕

caption.en: A rain-slick night; the big screen rides above the corner.
caption.zh: 雨夜街角——巨幕高悬于餐厅之上。

name.zh: 时代广场 · 转角斜切

caption.en: Neon crossing at night — a tall panel raking hard to the right.
caption.zh: 霓虹夜路口——高大灯箱强烈向右斜切。

caption.en: Cool museum light — a large canvas at three-quarter view.
caption.zh: 冷调展厅光——三分之四视角的大幅画作。

caption.en: Open air — a vertical poster panel at the bus stop.
caption.zh: 户外——公交站旁的竖式海报灯箱。

caption.en: Underground — a long panel raking down the concourse.
caption.zh: 地下长廊——沿墙斜展的灯箱广告。
